query: X Grok AI Following feed ranking algorithm launch date

{"query":"X Grok AI Following feed ranking algorithm launch date","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1525,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.ndtv.com/world-news/elon-musk-launches-following-feed-on-x-grok-will-rank-posts-for-you-9709329","title":"Elon Musk Launches 'Following' Feed On X, Grok Will Rank Posts For You","content":"Grok will rank the 'following' feed to show the most engaging posts first.
Elon Musk-owned social media platform X has rolled out a major update to its ‘Following' timeline, introducing AI-powered ranking through its in-house chatbot, Grok.
Posts from people you follow are prioritised based on what Grok predicts will be most engaging or interesting to you.
View Grok-Ranked Posts - By default, Grok will now rank posts based on engagement and relevance.
Alongside the Grok-powered feed, X earlier introduced a major account-verification tool called “About this account.” The feature is designed to help users judge whether a profile is genuine as bots, spam, and AI-generated accounts increase on the platform."},{"url":"https://forkoff.xyz/blog/founder-growth/grok-x-algorithm-marketing-playbook-2026","title":"X (Twitter) Algorithm 2026: How Grok Ranks + How to Win","content":"Failure modes: how a 2024 playbook dies on a 2026 feed
The strategies failing hardest now are the ones that were correct in 2024 and were never updated after X open-sourced the Grok-based recommendation engine in January 2026.
The X algorithm in 2026 reads."},{"url":"https://www.socialmediatoday.com/news/x-formerly-twitter-sorts-following-feed-algorithm-ai-grok/806617/","title":"X Now Algorithmically Ranks Posts in Following Feed | Social Media Today","content":"X is working to further integrate its Grok AI tools into the app, with the platform now using AI to sort your “Following” feed based on “predicted engagement and relevance to you,” so you’ll no longer see either your “Following” or “For You” feed in chronological order when you log in.
That means that your “Following” feed in the app is now ranked based on your past interactions, engagement with certain topics, signals from the accounts that you follow, etc.
© 2025 TechTarget, Inc. or its subsidiaries."},{"url":"https://www.gadgets360.com/apps/news/grok-will-rank-x-posts-elon-musk-premium-price-in-india-reduced-9710199","title":"Elon Musk’s X Will Now Rank Following Feed Posts Using Grok’s AI Capabilities | Technology News","content":"Elon Musk advises users to update the X app to see posts ranked by Grok in the Following timeline.
X Premium is now available in India at discounted price of Rs.
X app has been updated with a new AI-powered feature, which allows Grok, the platform's artificial intelligence (AI) agent, to rank posts in a user's ‘Following' timeline.
With the new update, the social media platform will show people's posts in the Following timeline based on the users they follow, what it deems to be more relevant, and their past interactions, instead of ranking them in a chronological order.
Separately, the X Premium subscription price in India has been reduced to Rs."},{"url":"https://www.socialsamosa.com/news-2/x-chronological-following-grok-ai-algorithm-10827353","title":"X replaces chronological following feed with Grok AI algorithm","content":"The latest app update now ranks posts by predicted engagement and relevance, ordering the ‘Following’ feed based on users’ past interactions and topic preferences.
X has begun using its Grok artificial intelligence system to rank posts in users’ ‘Following’ feeds, moving away from the chronological timeline that has long been a central feature of the platform.
X owner Elon Musk announced the change last week, writing: “Posts of people you follow are now ranked by Grok.
The platform now defaults to the ‘For You’ tab even if they previously closed the app on ‘Following’, signalling a stronger push toward its algorithm-driven timeline."}]}

X deleted its heuristics and let Grok read every post to rank the feed. The 2026 marketing playbook for an LLM-ranked X and what replaced velocity gaming. X open-sourced a Grok-transformer recommendation engine in January 2026 and is deleting its hand-coded heuristics, so an LLM now reads every post and watches every video to rank the For You feed. The 2026 motion is semantic fit (one clear claim per post the model can match to a real interest), save-worthy depth (the bookmark signal does the ranking work the like used to), topical account consistency, and video the model can parse. The X algorithm in 2026 is the single biggest distribution variable in founder marketing, and almost every account is still optimizing for a version of it that the platform is actively deleting.
